An official website of the United States government

Here's how you know

Official websites use .gov
A .gov website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.

Secure .gov websites use HTTPS
A lock () or https:// means you've safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.

Explore USWDS

USWDS Components

Below are examples of common USWDS components rendered inside an Astro page.

Alerts

Informational status

This is an informational alert. You can use it to surface helpful information to users.

Success status

The action was completed successfully.

Warning status

This is a warning. Please review before proceeding.

Error status

Something went wrong. Please try again.

Buttons

Form Elements

Checkboxes
Radio buttons

Accordion

The U.S. Web Design System (USWDS) is a toolkit of principles, guidance, and code to help government teams design and build accessible, mobile-friendly websites.

Astro generates fast static sites with minimal JavaScript. Pairing it with USWDS lets you build accessible government-quality UIs while keeping page weight low.

USWDS exposes design tokens through Sass variables. You can override tokens in a custom Sass theme file before importing @uswds/uswds.

Table

Sample data table
Package Version Purpose
astro 5.x Static site generator / meta-framework
@uswds/uswds 3.x U.S. Web Design System components & styles

Tag / Badge

New Big tag
